zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Loundres於大約1358年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯阿斯賀波時，她的父親Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas29歲，母親Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare27歲。她和Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1460年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Loundres于大约1358年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯阿斯賀波时，她的父亲Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas29岁，母亲Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare27岁。她和Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1460年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Loundres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Loundres was born about 1358, in Athboy, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas, was 29 and her mother, Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. She died before 1460.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Loundres est née environ 1358, à Athboy, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. Elle est décédée avant 1460.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Loundres um 1358 in Athboy, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare 27. Sie hatte mit Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1460.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Loundres è nata il circa 1358 nel Athboy, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. Morì prima del 1460.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Loundresが約1358年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスアスボイで生まれた時，父Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naasは29歳，母Lady Alice Leynes of Kildareは27歳であった。彼女はSir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanstonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1460年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Loundres(이)가 대략 1358년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 앳h보이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Loundres nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Athboy, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. Ela faleceu antes 1460.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Loundres родилась около 1358 г. в местности атбои, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. Она умерла перед 1460 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Loundres nació aproximadamente 1358, en Athboy, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir William de Loundres Baron Of Naas, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Leynes of Kildare, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston. Murió antes de 1460.
